text:
Saoirse Ronan was nominated for the Academy Award for Best Actress for Lady Bird, but she did not win.

She won the Golden Globe for Lady Bird, which is probably why it’s easy to remember it that way. At the Oscars that year, the Best Actress winner was Frances McDormand for Three Billboards Outside Ebbing, Missouri.

So the definitive answer: nominated, not an Oscar winner for Lady Bird.
